description:
The command-reference sections drifted from src/cli_sub.rs CloseArgs and the Show command:

- 'bl close' gained --delivered SHA, --delivered-repo URL, and --resolve-remote (bl-87ea / bl-733e / bl-e454, shipped 0.4.0). README's '### bl close' section and SKILL.md's command-table row for bl close mention only --sync/--no-sync; the three delivery-resolution flags appear in neither.
- 'bl show' gained --resolve-remote (bl-f37b). README's '### bl show' section and SKILL.md's table row do not mention it.

Both are real user-facing clap flags with help text. A command reference that omits half a command's options is inaccurate-by-incompleteness -- a reader treats the section as exhaustive. Add the flags to README's bl close / bl show sections and SKILL.md's command table.

Same class of drift as bl-9c17 (Task schema) and bl-7cea (config). Audited 2026-05-20.
title: README/SKILL: bl close and bl show command refs omit newer flags
